title: evolution-guard module, evolution_approvals migration, personalities + evolution REST API
acceptance_criteria: evolution-guard.ts exports MUTABLE_PARAMETERS readonly string array: ['min_probability','max_daily_trades','max_daily_loss','entry_delay_secs','adjustment_trigger_points','max_open_legs','reentry_min_probability','min_vix','max_vix','require_profit_gate','profit_gate_amount','profit_gate_days','reentry_delay_mins']

evolution-guard.ts exports assertEvolutionAllowed(personality: PersonalityConfig, parameter: string): void — throws FrozenPersonalityError if is_frozen, throws Error if parameter not in MUTABLE_PARAMETERS

EXISTING auto-apply path applyEvolutionRules() in evolution-rules.ts is REWRITTEN to: (a) call assertEvolutionAllowed() per proposal, (b) use MUTABLE_PARAMETERS allowlist for column name (no raw ${parameter} string interpolation), (c) wrap UPDATE personality_configs + UPDATE retrospection_results.applied in a single withTransaction()
Migration 003 creates evolution_approvals table with CHECK constraint on parameter column matching MUTABLE_PARAMETERS list; includes retrospection_result_id UUID REFERENCES retrospection_results(id)
GET /api/personalities returns array of all active PersonalityConfig rows from DB
GET /api/evolution/pending returns pending evolution_approvals rows joined with personality name

POST /api/evolution/:id/approve runs 7-step withTransaction: (1) SELECT...FOR UPDATE, (2) 409 if status != 'pending', (3) assertEvolutionAllowed (frozen + parameter allowlist), (4) comparison-integrity DB check (min_probability drift across Precision/Adjuster/Reducer must be <= 8pp), (5) UPDATE personality_configs SET validated_col = proposed_value, (6) UPDATE evolution_approvals SET status='applied', reviewed_at=NOW(), (7) UPDATE retrospection_results SET applied=TRUE, applied_at=NOW(); returns 200 on success
POST /api/evolution/:id/reject: withTransaction flips status='rejected' with optional body.reason; returns 200
Clockwork (is_frozen=true) cannot be approved — assertEvolutionAllowed throws and approve returns 400
TypeScript strict mode throughout; all DB queries parameterized
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
